Practice Management

TheraNest vs SimplePractice: a side-by-side comparison

Last updated: January 15, 2025 • 5 min read

# TheraNest vs SimplePractice: a side-by-side comparison You’re staring at your laptop at 9 p.m., still catching up on notes, manually sending invoices, and texting clients reminders from your personal phone. You know you need practice-management software, but every comparison you find reads like a sales brochure. This post walks through exactly what TheraNest and SimplePractice give you—pricing, note writing, telehealth, billing, and the real-world quirks—so you can pick one and get back to doing therapy. **Quick verdict:** If you want the lowest possible monthly cost and can live without a client portal, choose TheraNest. If you want a modern client portal, AI help with treatment plans, and room to grow, SimplePractice justifies the extra dollars. ## TheraNest ### Pricing & Value - $39/mo first clinician - $15/mo each add-on clinician - Unlimited non-clinical staff at no extra charge - No setup fee - No free trial ### Core Features - Pre-loaded note library (DSM-5, ICD-10, CPT codes) - Customisable SOAP & DAP templates - Built-in HIPAA video for up to 50 participants at no extra cost - Basic client portal for intake and consent only—no secure messaging or booking requests - ERA/EFT connections to 2,500+ payers; batch claims; no in-house clearinghouse - Accepts Stripe and PayPal; no automatic superbill generation - HIPAA, PIPEDA, GDPR compliant; data centres in US only; no BAA for non-US clients - iOS/Android clinician app with offline access; no client app ### Pros - Lowest monthly cost for a solo therapist - Unlimited non-clinical staff included - Built-in video without an add-on fee - Simple interface with minimal learning curve ### Cons - No secure client messaging or portal booking - Limited telehealth features (no waiting room, no group sessions) - No AI or modern automation helpers - Support available only US business hours ### Best for Budget-focused solo clinicians who need basic scheduling, note writing, and free video—nothing more. ## SimplePractice ### Pricing & Value - Starter: $39/mo (one clinician) - Essential: $59/mo - Plus: $79/mo - 30-day free trial on all tiers - Add-ons: Telehealth $15/mo on Starter, Wiley treatment-planner $25/mo, e-claim filing $0.85/claim on lower plans ### Core Features - 100+ note and form templates; auto-fill client data - AI-assisted Treatment Planner on Plus plan - Wiley Treatment Planner available as add-on - Integrated outcome measures (PHQ-9, GAD-7, etc.) - Unlimited HIPAA video on Essential & Plus; waiting room; screen-share; group up to 50; mobile-friendly - Full client portal: booking, secure messaging, payments, forms, outcome measures - Brandable client mobile app on Plus plan - In-house clearinghouse; one-click e-claim; automatic ERAs - Credit-card on file; auto-superbills; CMS-1500 support - Eligibility checks on Plus plan - HIPAA, PIPEDA, GDPR; data centres in US & EU; BAA for all regions; SOC-2 Type II - Clinician & client iOS/Android apps with Apple/Google Pay and push notifications ### Pros - Comprehensive client portal that actually reduces email - AI treatment planner speeds up documentation - Robust mobile apps for both you and clients - 7-day support plus free concierge migration from 20+ systems ### Cons - Best features locked behind higher-tier plans - Per-claim charge on Starter and Essential - Interface can feel overwhelming if you only need the basics ### Best for Therapists who want a modern client experience, automation, and room to grow into group practice. ## Head-to-Head Comparison | Feature | TheraNest | SimplePractice | |---------|-----------|----------------| | Base monthly cost (solo) | $39 | $39 Starter / $59 Essential | | Free trial | No | 30 days | | Client portal & messaging | Basic intake only | Full portal with secure messaging | | Telehealth | Included, up to 50 | Unlimited on Essential+ / $15 add-on Starter | | AI treatment planner | No | Yes (Plus plan) | | In-house clearinghouse | No | Yes | | Support hours | US business days only | 7 days/week | | Data hosting | US only | US & EU | ## Who Should Choose Which **Pick TheraNest if you:** - Need the absolute lowest fixed cost - Don’t care about a client portal or secure messaging - Want video included without extra charges - Prefer a stripped-down, no-frills system **Pick SimplePractice if you:** - Want clients to book, message, and pay without calling you - Need AI help writing treatment plans - Plan to add clinicians later and want a single platform - Value weekend support and free data migration ## FAQ ### Is SimplePractice better than TheraNest for UK therapists? SimplePractice offers GBP pricing, Stripe UK integration, and EU data hosting; TheraNest invoices in GBP but keeps data in the US and supports only US business hours. ### Does TheraNest have a client portal like SimplePractice? TheraNest has a basic portal for intake forms and consent only—no secure messaging, booking requests, or payments. ### Which is cheaper for a solo therapist, TheraNest or SimplePractice? Both start at $39/mo, but TheraNest includes video at no extra cost while SimplePractice charges $15/mo for Telehealth on the Starter plan. ### Can I migrate my data from TheraNest to SimplePractice? SimplePractice offers free concierge migration from TheraNest and 20+ other systems; TheraNest only supports CSV imports with no migration service. ### Do either TheraNest or SimplePractice support Canadian provincial billing? SimplePractice supports provincial health cards and MSP forms; TheraNest does not have a Canadian clearinghouse. ## Conclusion If your priority is keeping overhead as low as possible and you can live without a client portal, TheraNest gives you notes, scheduling, and video for a flat $39. If you want clients to self-book, message securely, and pay online—and you’d like AI to speed up your treatment plans—SimplePractice is worth the higher tiers. Take the 30-day free trial of SimplePractice or start with TheraNest today and upgrade later when the extra features pay for themselves. Try SIMPLEPRACTICE free → Try THERANEST free →

Reviewed by the Therapist Tools editorial team
